ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "competition" TEXT /* Competition the team participates in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "primary_sport" TEXT /* Primary sport the team participates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2022/23) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches that ended in a draw */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team in the season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the team */,
  "injuries_count" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition (e.g., Championship, Premier League) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the competition */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the competition (e.g., League, Knockout) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the competition is held */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the competition's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defender) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "yellow_cards_received" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player in the season */,
  "red_cards_received" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player in the season */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries the player suffered in the season */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Home Win, Away Win, Draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., League, Cup, Friendly) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Completed, Postponed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  "coaching_licenses" TEXT /* List of coaching licenses held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance at matches */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Total ticket sales */,
  "social_media_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on social media */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average fan rating for the team */,
  "fan_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the fan base (e.g., age range, gender) */,
  "fan_satisfaction_score" TEXT /* Overall fan satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
